Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: The first of a 3 stage build of the durable small block Chevy.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Video.summary: Stage II of our small block Chevy build gets block modifications.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Video.summary: Pat and Mike button up their Gen III Hemi with super trick heads, then it's tech tip time with Mike and Pat.
Video.title: Hemi Top End Magic

Video.summary: In Stage 3 of our small-block build, our 383 becomes a 406.
Video.title: In-House Power Mouse Roars

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc head out to salvage an old B-Body that has seen better days.
Video.title: Salvage Yard Special

Video.summary: Detroit Muscle begins their journey of bringing a ’69 Plymouth Road Runner back from the brink.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 1: Suspension Tension

Video.summary: Our ’69 Road Runner, nicknamed Road Burner, gets a Gen III Hemi engine swap.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant
’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant
’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant

Video.summary: The ’69 Road Runner gets an exterior upgrade.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint
’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint
’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel give the ’69 Road Runner’s interior a much-needed makeover.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 4: Insider Trading

Video.summary: We make all the right connections and dash towards the finish line our ’69 Road Runner.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish
’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish
’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish

Video.summary: We create a one-of-a-kind emblem and then use some wool to clear up Road Burner’s eyes.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!
’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!
’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!

Video.summary: We are going to show how mother nature’s handiwork can create a masterpiece worthy of a Hot Wheel.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 7: School’s Out!

Video.summary: A burned-up 6.4L Gen III HEMI is revived with some old school hot rod parts.
Video.title: Old School/New School HEMI

Video.summary: We visit UNOH where we build and dyno a brutal 434ci UMP Modified dirt track engine.
Video.title: 434ci UMP Race Engine

Video.summary: Morphing a Firebird into a Trans Am
Video.title: Trans Am Transformation

Video.summary: Building a 500 horse pump gas Pontiac
Video.title: Trans Am Part 2

Video.summary: Upgrading F-body Poncho suspension & brakes
Video.title: Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic

Image.alt: Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic
Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic
Trans Am Part 3 Movie Car Magic

Video.summary: How to build a posi-traction rear end
Video.title: Stout Differential

Video.summary: Modifying Rear Suspension and Frame for Big Power
Video.title: Tough As Nails Trans Am

Video.summary: How-to restore cracked fiberglass body panels, customize fender scoops and remove decals without paint damage.
Video.title: Bandit Body Building

Video.summary: Guest builder Chris Ryan coats our Tribute Trans Am with ebony paint.
Video.title: Beautiful Black Bird

Video.summary: How-to soundproof and refurbish a worn-out interior. Plus the guys show how to make a shaker hood.
Video.title: Interior Creature Comforts

Video.summary: Big inch Pontiac TA gets tuned on the chassis dyno and how to dial in your alignment without going to a shop.
Video.title: Firebird Finale

Video.summary: With a nod to the Grand National we’re giving our Buick Regal more Go Go.
Video.title: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal
Race Inspired Fuel System for a Buick Regal

Image.alt: Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses
Tips for Custom Brake Lines and Hoses

Image.alt: How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint
How-To Body Prep and Lay Down Candy Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc give us some tips on painting trim and glass installation.
Video.title: Buick Regal Paint and Trim

Video.title: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Image.alt: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: It's the start of our all new MuscleTrux series and to kick it off, Ford versus Chevy.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 1

Video.summary: Bowtie boy Ryan's got a big play for using big displacement to make big power for his entry.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 2: 1990 Chevrolet 454 SS

Video.summary: It's Blue Oval boy Kevin's turn to take over the shop.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 3: 1994 Ford Lightning

Video.summary: It's another shot in our MuscleTrux series as Kevin's 1994 Ford Lightning prepares for battle.
Video.title: MuscleTrux Part 4

Video.summary: We put custom touches on our 496ci Stroker Big Block and get it ready for the street rod life!
Video.title: 496ci Stroker Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: The Blazer gets stripped to bare metal and our SuperMax Silverado is treated to front suspension upgrades.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Image.alt: Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades
Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades
Klassy K5 Blast & Body Work, Silverado IFS Upgrades

Video.summary: Restoration of our 89 Blazer continues by stripping the frame bare and repairing the damage.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Frame Repair, Axles

Video.summary: Our '89 blazer frame is back from powdercoat where it can be turned into a rolling chassis.
Video.title: Klassy K5 Rolling Chassis

Video.summary: The '89 Blazer 4x4 returns for lockers in the rear - and new gearing up front, along with steering upgrades
Video.title: Klassy K5 Axle Rebuild

Video.summary: After months of prep, the '89 Blazer hits the paint booth for a custom mix of color.
Video.title: Chevy Blazer Custom Paint

Video.summary: Klassy K5 returns from fresh paint for re-assembly, and interior goodies.
Video.title: Chevy Blazer Assembly/Interior

Video.summary: The supercharged big block Blazer hits the trails in search of a big mud hole.
Video.title: Supercharged '89 K5 Square Body Searches For a Mud Hole

Video.summary: From 260,000 mile workhorse to sweet sport truck
Video.title: Senior Silverado

Video.summary: How to lower a half-ton Chevy front & rear
Video.title: In The Weeds

Video.summary: Fixing rusted doors, rockers & a new roll pan
Video.title: Sheet Metal Mods

Video.summary: Custom sport truck tech - a smooth front bumper and grill install.
Video.title: Sr. Silverado: Smoother Front & Rear

Video.summary: The guys show why pre-paint body work and surface prep are the secret of achieving a killer paint job.
Video.title: Senior Silverado: Perfect Paint Prep

Video.summary: The 350 in our 260,000 mile Chevy gets yanked out and replaced with a 383 Stroker crate short block.
Video.title: Senior Silverado: Heart Transplant

Video.summary: What you need to know about how to rebuild and upgrade GM's 4L60E four speed automatic overdrive transmission.
Video.title: 4 Speed Tutorial: GM's 4L60-E

Video.summary: Tech on how-to swap in, and dial in a street performance automatic transmission and complete the driveline.
Video.title: Senior Silverado: Drivetrain Finale

Video.summary: Low buck Chevy Sport Truck gets shake down on the street after converting from open diff to limited slip.
Video.title: Senior Silverado: Out on the Streets
